Pricing

Transparent pricing, no surprises

Start free. Upgrade when you need more. Cancel anytime. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

For founders exploring strategies and tools

Free

No credit card required

  • AI Readiness Assessment (basic)
  • 3 marketplace asset downloads/month
  • Perspectives articles (unlimited)
  • AI Advisor chatbot (5 sessions/month)
  • Community forum access
  • Sector benchmarks
  • Priority specialist matching
  • Custom AI roadmap report
  • Team seats
  • Dedicated customer success manager

MSME Pro

For growing businesses ready to execute

per year (save 38% vs monthly)

  • AI Advisor chatbot (unlimited sessions)

  • Priority specialist matching
  • Custom AI roadmap report (1/year)
  • 3 team seats
  • Dedicated customer success manager

For ₹50 Cr+ businesses and multi-team deployments

Custom

Billed annually

Consulting Engagements

Need expert consulting, not just tools?

Our Strategy, Agentic AI, Process Transformation, Digital, and Organisation Transformation practices are independently scoped. Starting from ₹75,000 for a focused sprint.

Explore ServicesGet a Custom Quote

Pricing FAQ

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. MSME Pro subscriptions can be cancelled at any time. You keep access until the end of your billing period. No auto-renewal without reminder.

Do you offer a free trial for MSME Pro?

Yes — paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. You'll be notified 3 days before the trial ends.

Can I get a GST invoice?

Yes. All plans include GST-compliant invoices with Eccellere's GSTIN. Enterprise plans support PO-based billing.

What happens to my purchased assets if I cancel?

Individual marketplace asset purchases are permanent — you keep lifetime access to anything you've bought, regardless of subscription status.

Does MSME Pro cover consulting engagements?

Subscriptions cover platform access, digital tools, and marketplace discounts. Consulting engagements (Strategy, Process Transformation, etc.) are separately scoped and priced.

Is there a discount for NGOs or educational institutions?

Yes — we offer 30% discounts for registered NGOs and educational institutions. Contact us with your registration documents.
